historical_stories.title: Integrate Equifax API for retail credit scoring
historical_stories.description: Connect to Equifax REST API, send applicant PII, parse JSON response, and store credit score in Postgres.

historical_stories.title: Integrate World-Check API for AML screening
historical_stories.description: Send company name and directors to Refinitiv World-Check. Handle fuzzy matching responses, rate limiting, and XML parsing. Map to internal risk DB.

historical_stories.title: Build SWIFT payment gateway integration
historical_stories.description: Connect core banking to SWIFT network for cross-border payments. Requires heavy cryptography, HSM integration, and ISO 20022 message formatting.
